**Formats**

> This documentation is for an out-of-date version of Apache Flink. We recommend you use the latest [stable version](<//nightlies.apache.org/flink/flink-docs-stable/docs/connectors/table/formats/overview/>).

#  Formats #

Flink provides a set of table formats that can be used with table connectors. A table format is a storage format defines how to map binary data onto table columns.

Flink supports the following formats:

Formats | Supported Connectors
---|---
[CSV](<//nightlies.apache.org/flink/flink-docs-release-1.13/docs/connectors/table/formats/csv/>) | [Apache Kafka](<//nightlies.apache.org/flink/flink-docs-release-1.13/docs/connectors/table/kafka/>), [Upsert Kafka](<//nightlies.apache.org/flink/flink-docs-release-1.13/docs/connectors/table/upsert-kafka/>), [Amazon Kinesis Data Streams](<//nightlies.apache.org/flink/flink-docs-release-1.13/docs/connectors/table/kinesis/>), [Filesystem](<//nightlies.apache.org/flink/flink-docs-release-1.13/docs/connectors/table/filesystem/>)
[JSON](<//nightlies.apache.org/flink/flink-docs-release-1.13/docs/connectors/table/formats/json/>) | [Apache Kafka](<//nightlies.apache.org/flink/flink-docs-release-1.13/docs/connectors/table/kafka/>), [Upsert Kafka](<//nightlies.apache.org/flink/flink-docs-release-1.13/docs/connectors/table/upsert-kafka/>), [Amazon Kinesis Data Streams](<//nightlies.apache.org/flink/flink-docs-release-1.13/docs/connectors/table/kinesis/>), [Filesystem](<//nightlies.apache.org/flink/flink-docs-release-1.13/docs/connectors/table/filesystem/>), [Elasticsearch](<//nightlies.apache.org/flink/flink-docs-release-1.13/docs/connectors/table/elasticsearch/>)
[Apache Avro](<//nightlies.apache.org/flink/flink-docs-release-1.13/docs/connectors/table/formats/avro/>) | [Apache Kafka](<//nightlies.apache.org/flink/flink-docs-release-1.13/docs/connectors/table/kafka/>), [Upsert Kafka](<//nightlies.apache.org/flink/flink-docs-release-1.13/docs/connectors/table/upsert-kafka/>), [Amazon Kinesis Data Streams](<//nightlies.apache.org/flink/flink-docs-release-1.13/docs/connectors/table/kinesis/>), [Filesystem](<//nightlies.apache.org/flink/flink-docs-release-1.13/docs/connectors/table/filesystem/>)
[Confluent Avro](<//nightlies.apache.org/flink/flink-docs-release-1.13/docs/connectors/table/formats/avro-confluent/>) | [Apache Kafka](<//nightlies.apache.org/flink/flink-docs-release-1.13/docs/connectors/table/kafka/>), [Upsert Kafka](<//nightlies.apache.org/flink/flink-docs-release-1.13/docs/connectors/table/upsert-kafka/>)
[Debezium CDC](<//nightlies.apache.org/flink/flink-docs-release-1.13/docs/connectors/table/formats/debezium/>) | [Apache Kafka](<//nightlies.apache.org/flink/flink-docs-release-1.13/docs/connectors/table/kafka/>), [Filesystem](<//nightlies.apache.org/flink/flink-docs-release-1.13/docs/connectors/table/filesystem/>)
[Canal CDC](<//nightlies.apache.org/flink/flink-docs-release-1.13/docs/connectors/table/formats/canal/>) | [Apache Kafka](<//nightlies.apache.org/flink/flink-docs-release-1.13/docs/connectors/table/kafka/>), [Filesystem](<//nightlies.apache.org/flink/flink-docs-release-1.13/docs/connectors/table/filesystem/>)
[Maxwell CDC](<//nightlies.apache.org/flink/flink-docs-release-1.13/docs/connectors/table/formats/maxwell/>) | [Apache Kafka](<//nightlies.apache.org/flink/flink-docs-release-1.13/docs/connectors/table/kafka/>), [Filesystem](<//nightlies.apache.org/flink/flink-docs-release-1.13/docs/connectors/table/filesystem/>)
[Apache Parquet](<//nightlies.apache.org/flink/flink-docs-release-1.13/docs/connectors/table/formats/parquet/>) | [Filesystem](<//nightlies.apache.org/flink/flink-docs-release-1.13/docs/connectors/table/filesystem/>)
[Apache ORC](<//nightlies.apache.org/flink/flink-docs-release-1.13/docs/connectors/table/formats/orc/>) | [Filesystem](<//nightlies.apache.org/flink/flink-docs-release-1.13/docs/connectors/table/filesystem/>)
[Raw](<//nightlies.apache.org/flink/flink-docs-release-1.13/docs/connectors/table/formats/raw/>) | [Apache Kafka](<//nightlies.apache.org/flink/flink-docs-release-1.13/docs/connectors/table/kafka/>), [Upsert Kafka](<//nightlies.apache.org/flink/flink-docs-release-1.13/docs/connectors/table/upsert-kafka/>), [Amazon Kinesis Data Streams](<//nightlies.apache.org/flink/flink-docs-release-1.13/docs/connectors/table/kinesis/>), [Filesystem](<//nightlies.apache.org/flink/flink-docs-release-1.13/docs/connectors/table/filesystem/>)
